message:
fix(api): validate multinomial weights are finite and non-negative; check positive-weight count for without-replacement sampling

- Add per-weight is_finite() and >= 0 validation in multinomial,
  rejecting NaN, Infinity, and negative weights before normalization —
  previously non-finite weights would silently produce garbage
  probability distributions
- Add positive-weight count check for without-replacement sampling:
  reject when num_samples exceeds the number of categories with weight > 0,
  preventing infinite loops where zeroed-out weights leave no valid
  candidates
- Add multinomial_rejects_too_many_positive_weight_draws_without_replacement,
  multinomial_rejects_negative_weights, multinomial_rejects_nan_weights,
  and multinomial_rejects_infinite_weights tests

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
